data.Modification: Loss of arginine due to transpeptidation/Deletion of R

project.title: To functionally investigate the manner that UBQLN1 regulate mitochondria function,we searched for the UBQLN1-interacting proteins,we first conducted LC-MS with 3Flag-UBQLN1 cell line
project.projectDescription: To functionally investigate the manner that UBQLN1 regulatr mitochondria function,we searched for UBQLN1-interacting proteins,we conduct LC-MS with 3flag-UBQLN1 cell line
project.sampleProcessingProtocol: Cells were harvested and conduct co-IP with Flag antibody,next,we boil the pull-down protein and run the SDS-PAGE,at last,we conduct LC-MS to find UBQLN1 interacting proteins
project.dataProcessingProtocol: we use Flag group to minus IgG group as UBQLN1-interacting proteins

references.referenceLine: Zhao S, Li J, Duan S, Liu C, Wang H, Lu J, Zhao N, Sheng X, Wu Y, Li Y, Sun B, Liu L. UBQLN1 links proteostasis and mitochondria function to telomere maintenance in human embryonic stem cells. Stem Cell Res Ther. 2024 15(1):180

identifiedPTMStrings.name: No PTMs are included in the dataset

Characteristics[CellLine]: WA26 (obtained from WiCell Research Institute) hESCs
Characteristics[Modification]: acetylation modification and oxidation on Met
Comment[AcquisitionMethod]: A data-dependent procedure that alternated between one MS scan followed by 20 MS/MS scans with 15.0 s dynamic exclusion.
Comment[MS2MassAnalyzer]: the fragments were detected in the Orbitrap at a resolution of 17,500.
Comment[SpecilizedMS]: Co-immunoprecipitation (Co-IP) and liquid chromatography mass spectrometry (LC-MS)
